case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JIMMI ROMERO ALEXANDER MENDEZ

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-27-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JIMMI ROMERO ALEXANDER MENDEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDEZ, JIMMI ROMERO ALEXANDER $339.28 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $419.28 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $614.28 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MENDEZ, JIMMI ROMERO ALEXANDER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
